task.title: Web Console Foundation
task.description: Set up Next.js 15 project with React 19, shadcn/ui, and Effect integration

implementation.details:
1. Create Next.js 15 project with App Router
2. Install React 19, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS 4
3. Set up Effect 3.x with TypeScript 5.x
4. Configure authentication with JWT
5. Add basic layout and navigation components

task.acceptance_criteria: Next.js app builds and runs, Effect integration works, authentication flow functional, shadcn/ui components render
